mapper.select: select review_id, user_id, question_id, weight, easiness_factor, repetitions, interval_days, last_quality, last_review_time, next_review_time, review_count, status, create_time, update_time from review where user_id = #{userId} and status = 0 and ( next_review_time is null or next_review_time < current_date + interval 1 day ) order by weight desc, next_review_time asc, update_time asc limit #{total}

select r.user_id, least(count(*), coalesce(rc.review_count, 2147483647)) AS pending_count from review r left join review_record rr on rr.user_id = r.user_id and rr.review_date = current_date left join review_config rc on rc.user_id = r.user_id where rr.review_record_id is null and r.status = 0 and ( r.next_review_time is null or r.next_review_time < current_date + interval 1 day ) and coalesce(rc.enable_auto_review, 1) = 1 group by r.user_id;
